variants.title: R960H1606A
variants.option1Value: MicroFit® UltraGen III MFHLP30232 Pressure Filter | Replaces the Fairey Arlon R960H1606A
variants.description: The MICROFIT® UltraGen III MFHLP30232 is the MICROFIT® approved replacement to the Fairey Arlon R960H1606A. Engineered and manufactured in Great Britain the MFHLP30232 is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of OEM quality standards, ensuring superior filtration performance and the longest possible filter life. Building on over 50 years of filtration expertise, the UltraGen III series is the third generation of MICROFIT® filter media, delivering exceptional efficiency and reliability. FilterFinder is an approved distributor of MICROFIT® filters. With expert product knowledge, dedicated support, and a large stock availability, FilterFinder ensures you receive the parts you need when you need them, every time.
specifications: Style: Pressure Filter, Media: Glass Fiber, Efficiency 1: 5µ @ β200, Efficiency 2: 7µ @ β1000, Outer Diameter: 78.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 43.2 mm, Length: 428.0 mm, Δ Collapse Pressure: 21 bar, Seal Material: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 5µ @ β200, Media Type: Glass Fiber, Flow Direction: OUT-IN, Collapse Pressure: 21 BAR, Seal: Nitrile

variants.title: R960H1606A
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter SH 87163 Pressure Filter | Replaces the Fairey Arlon R960H1606A
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SH 87163 Hydraulic Filter. Engineered to protect and optimize the performance of hydraulic systems, this filter delivers exceptional contamination control. Premium filter media captures fine particles and debris that could compromise system integrity, helping to extend the lifespan of critical hydraulic components. By maintaining fluid cleanliness, it reduces wear and tear while supporting consistent pressure levels throughout the system. Perfect for a wide range of hydraulic applications—from industrial machinery to heavy-duty equipment—this filter provides reliable performance even under high-pressure conditions. Its robust construction ensures long-lasting durability, helping to minimize downtime and maintenance costs while maximizing operational efficiency.
specifications: Style: HYDRAULIC FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 79.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 42.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 429.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 424.0 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 5µ @ β200, Efficiency 2: 7µ @ β1000, Outer Diameter: 78.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 43.2 mm, Length: 428.0 mm, Media Type: Glass Fiber, Flow Direction: OUT-IN, Collapse Pressure: 21 BAR, Seal: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C

Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the D143G06A provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.

variants.option1Value: Fleetguard HF7077 Hydraulic Filters | Replaces the Fairey Arlon R960H1606A
variants.description: Fleetguard® HF7077 hydraulic cartridge filter with synthetic media is designed to help keep your precision hydraulic systems running as intended, providing a solution for various applications.  This filter meets or exceeds the equipment OEM quality and performance and is the first aftermarket replacement available on the market today, bringing your operation top-quality performance and an overall unbeatable total cost of ownership.
